bodies.text: A psychiatrist in Ohio got audited last month. Cigna requested 18 months of records. She uses JotPsych. Every note had verified CPT codes, ICD-10 documentation, and medical necessity already locked in. She sent the files. No weekend spent reconstructing sessions. No clawbacks. That's what audit-ready actually means.

Ohio psychiatrist audited by Cigna? No sweat!
• 18 months of records requested
• JotPsych had her back with:
    Verified CPT codes 
    ICD-10 documentation 
    Medical necessity locked in
She sent the files and avoided a weekend of hassle. What would you do if you were audited today?

Ohio psychiatrist audited by Cigna last month
18 months of records requested, no problem!
She uses JotPsych:
• Verified CPT codes in every note
• ICD-10 documentation locked and loaded 
• Medical necessity already covered

 Sent files, done! No weekend wasted on reconstruction. No clawbacks either.
What's your audit plan?

• ICD-10 documentation locked down tight
• Medical necessity already established

She sent the files and breathed a sigh of relief.
No weekends wasted reconstructing sessions. No clawbacks either! What's your audit prep plan?

bodies.text: While basic scribes just transcribe, JotAudit runs real-time compliance checks on every note. 150+ rules from AMA, APA, and major payers built right in. Fix documentation gaps with one click — before they cost you thousands in clawbacks.

Ditch basic transcription services!

JotAudit runs real-time compliance checks on every note, using 150+ rules from AMA, APA & major payers.
Fix documentation gaps with one click and avoid costly clawbacks.

Is your practice at risk?

Don't just transcribe, get compliant!

• 150+ rules from AMA, APA & major payers built-in
• Real-time checks on every note to catch errors 
• Fix gaps with one click and avoid costly clawbacks

Is your documentation putting you at risk?

Say goodbye to tedious audits! 
JotAudit's real-time compliance checks ensure your notes meet 150+ rules from AMA, APA & top payers. 
• Fix documentation gaps with one click
• Avoid costly clawbacks - thousands of dollars at stake!
Take control of your compliance today

Ditch basic scribes that just transcribe!
JotAudit runs real-time compliance checks on every note with 150+ rules from AMA, APA & major payers built-in.

• Fix documentation gaps in one click
• Avoid thousands in clawbacks

Upgrade to JotAudit today!

Say goodbye to tedious transcriptions!
JotAudit does more than just write notes - it runs real-time compliance checks against 150+ rules from AMA, APA & major payers.

Fix documentation gaps in one click and avoid costly clawbacks. Are thousands of dollars slipping away due to incomplete records?

Review and fix instantly - no more surprises down the line!
